steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: The phrase “in the livid tongues of fire” shows something that can be seen or perceived.

steps.title: Match the meaning to the clue
steps.content:
D) Perceptible means able to be perceived, which matches the idea of the sun being visible in the fire.
The other three either describe decrease, understanding, or location, none of which convey perception.
That matches choice D — D is correct.
